reviews.review_msg: Jon Smith is one of the best English professors at SFU in my opinion. Write a solid essay and you'll get solid feeback. His lectures are enjoyable and he's knowledgeable about what he teaches.

Not a fan of Hitchcock or movies in general, but the assigned readings were excellent and so interesting. Torsten was kind, welcoming, and accommodating. Generally great to listen to and talk to. Even if you aren't interested in the content, he makes it fun. I love the class by the end of the semester.
Torsten is a great instructor! He's funny, good at teaching, and clearly loves his job. His marking is always thorough and not rushed. Definitely included in my top 3 favourite profs.

Prof. Budra is one of those professors that EVERYONE should have at least once before they graduate. He cares about making the material engaging and is extremely well-respected in his field. So sad for SFU to hear that he's retiring next year, but so happy that he's had such a long and awesome career.

TAKE HIS CLASSES. He is my favourite prof; extremely funny, engaging, approachable, and discussion-oriented. He does a great job of making every class fun and thought-provoking. I took his gaming class as someone that NEVER games, and still found it extremely interesting and filled with opportunities for participation. He's super passionate.
